name: Kiana Outer Reef Expedition 5D4N
description: Embark on a unique five-day adventure with the Kiana Outer Reef Expedition, where luxury meets exploration. This tour offers an intimate experience with only 8 guests, providing a personalized and enchanting journey through the Whitsunday Islands. Ideal for divers and snorkelers, this tour allows you to explore the vibrant marine life and stunning corals of the Outer Great Barrier Reef. Sail aboard a sleek and spacious vessel, visit the iconic Whitehaven Beach, and enjoy delectable meals prepared onboard. Perfect for those looking to slow down and truly connect with the natural beauty of the reef and islands.
departure_times: Departs: 8:00 am - Friday, Returns: 4:00 pm - Tuesday
includes:
All scuba dives included
Exclusive access to the Outer Great Barrier Reef
Snorkel gear, wetsuits, dive tanks, and weight belts provided
Additional PADI Advanced dive course available
Delectable meals prepared freshly onboard
Private twin cabins and modern bathrooms
Licensed vessel (No BYO)
highlights:
Explore lesser-known, kaleidoscopic reefs
Snorkel and scuba dive the Outer Great Barrier Reef
Sail aboard a sleek and spacious vessel
Visit Whitehaven Beach
Small group sailing with only 8 guests
Ample shaded foredeck for relaxing
Fully equipped dive equipment including water compressors
Rub shoulders with breathtaking marine life
locations: Airlie Beach,Great Barrier Reef,Hill Inlet,Hook Island,Whitehaven,Whitsunday Island
ideal_for: Divers, snorkelers, and adventure seekers looking for an intimate and luxurious exploration of the Whitsunday Islands and Outer Great Barrier Reef.

name: Kiana 3D2N
description: Experience the Whitsundays in style aboard Kiana, a luxurious sailing vessel offering a unique three-day adventure. Perfect for divers and ocean enthusiasts, this tour combines exploration with comfort, allowing you to dive into the vibrant underwater world of the Great Barrier Reef. With a maximum of 12 guests, enjoy a personalized experience featuring freshly prepared meals, private cabins, and opportunities for both snorkeling and scuba diving. Whether you're a first-time diver or an experienced explorer, Kiana promises an unforgettable journey through one of the world's most stunning marine environments.
departure_times: Departs: 8:00am - Monday & Friday, Returns: 4:00pm - Wednesday & Sunday
includes:
Maximum 12 passengers for a personalized experience
All meals prepared freshly onboard
Tea and coffee
Roomy air-conditioned interior
Private twin cabins available
Large bathrooms with ample fresh hot water
Large permanently shaded aft deck
Fully equipped water equipment including dive compressors
First scuba dive is free
Scuba diving and snorkeling
Visit the Whitsunday Islands and Outer Great Barrier Reef
highlights:
Sail around the Whitsunday Islands
Explore and snorkel the Outer Great Barrier Reef
Visit the world-famous Whitehaven Beach
Opportunity for scuba diving among colorful reefs
Extended 3-day trip
Personalized experience with a maximum of 12 guests
Diving for all levels of experience
Explore Bait Reef, a protected marine area
locations: Airlie Beach,Great Barrier Reef,Hill Inlet,Hook Island,Whitehaven,Whitsunday Island
ideal_for: Divers, ocean enthusiasts, and small groups seeking an intimate and adventurous sailing experience.
